item.text: I’m tracing the audit wiring directly in the workspace and will verify both lists from source: first the `PolicyDenial` construction sites, then every `AuditSink` implementation.
I’ve got the candidate files. Next I’m opening the exact construction and `impl` sites so the final list only includes real emit/synthesis locations, not readers or match arms.

One candidate dropped out already: the smoke example only pattern-matches on `PolicyDenial`, so it won’t be included. I’m checking for any alternate construction forms so we don’t miss a synthesized event created outside the direct enum literal search.

## A. PolicyDenial constructors
- `crates/orbit-agent/src/loop_engine/agent_loop.rs`: emits `LoopAuditEvent::PolicyDenial { ... }` when the agent loop blocks a tool call because the tool is not in the allowlist.
- `crates/orbit-engine/src/activity_job/tool_enforcement.rs`: synthesizes and emits a `LoopAuditEvent::PolicyDenial { ... }` inside `EnforcedAuditSink` when it sees a disallowed `ToolCallRequested` and needs to record the denial itself.

## B. AuditSink implementors
- `crates/orbit-agent/src/loop_engine/audit/mod.rs`: `NullSink`
- `crates/orbit-agent/src/loop_engine/audit/mod.rs`: `InMemorySink`
- `crates/orbit-agent/src/loop_engine/audit/mod.rs`: `JsonlFileSink`
- `crates/orbit-engine/src/activity_job/tool_enforcement.rs`: `EnforcedAuditSink`
